description: Original, emotionally-driven stories that feel like forgotten or unfinished narratives. Exists in a space between reality and memory, focusing on quiet human moments with subtle surreal elements.

narrator.name: The Storyteller
narrator.description: A gentle storyteller recalling something half-remembered. Reflective, emotional, introspective. Soft and immersive.
rules: No loud conflict or dramatic pacing
Speaks as though recalling a distant memory

opening_format.notes: Soft, intimate opening. Should feel like the start of a memory surfacing. Do not use a rigid format — let it flow naturally each time.

templates: And that was the last time anyone remembered.
The rest was never written down.
Some stories end before they finish.
closing_format.notes: Quiet resolution or deliberate ambiguity. Never tie everything up neatly.

visual_theme.lighting: Warm golden hour lighting, soft diffused light, gentle shadows
elements: Windows with soft light streaming in
Nature in gentle motion (leaves, water, grass)
visual_theme.environment: Intimate spaces, quiet landscapes, places that feel familiar but slightly unreal. Bedrooms, gardens, train stations, coastlines.
visual_theme.camera: Slow motion or stillness. Gentle drift. Emotional framing — close on details, then pulling back to reveal space.
visual_theme.image_prompt_suffix: soft focus, golden hour, dreamy atmosphere, film photography, warm tones, emotional, 4k

ambient_audio.style: Warm ambient pad with gentle piano-like overtones
